entries.label: Quest of the Jedi · Phase II Era
entries.note: Roughly 150 years before the Nihil, the Jedi confront the Path of the Open Hand and the distant origins of the Nameless.

entries.label: The Great Hyperspace Disaster · Phase I Era
entries.note: A catastrophic hyperspace accident draws the Jedi, at their height, into open war with the marauding Nihil.

entries.label: The Night of Sorrow - Fall of Starlight Beacon
entries.note: The Nihil sabotage and destroy Starlight Beacon, the Republic's shining symbol on the frontier, ending Phase I in tragedy.

entries.label: Trials of the Jedi · Phase III Era
entries.note: One year later the Nihil Stormwall seals off the Occlusion Zone as the Jedi fight the war's desperate final chapter.

summary: The core High Republic novels ordered by in-universe chronology rather than publication phase. Phase II opens the era roughly 150 years before the Great Hyperspace Disaster, then Phase I and Phase III follow in the years around the fall of Starlight Beacon.
title: The High Republic Timeline
